title: Delicious Mexican Sopes
description: A traditional Mexican dish made with crispy sopes, topped with a variety of ingredients.

ingredients.name: Corn
ingredients.notes: Fresh corn kernels or canned corn

instructions: 2. Warm the sopes according to package instructions.
3. In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium-high heat.
4. Add the carnitas and cook until crispy, about 4-5 minutes. Set aside.
5. In the same skillet, add the chorizo and cook until crispy, about 2-3 minutes. Set aside.
6. In a separate skillet, grill or boil the corn until slightly charred.
7. Assemble the sopes by spreading a spoonful of carnitas on each sopes, followed by a spoonful of chorizo, corn, and cheese.
8. Sprinkle with cilantro and a squeeze of lime juice (if using).
9. Serve immediately, topped with sour cream and salsa (if using).
